name: Chemotaxis Index
description: Per-worm mean chemotaxis index: (dist_to_start - dist_to_end) / (dist_to_start + dist_to_end). Requires a Start Point and End Point to be set in the project (e.g. representing the start of an odour gradient and the attractant source). Values range from -1 (always at start) to +1 (always at end). Shown as box-and-whisker per group.
